text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Part D Pharmacy Characteristics file. Each 
entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

CCW_PHARM_ID 

LABEL: CCW-assigned Pharmacy Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This is the CCW-assigned pharmacy identification number used to uniquely identify pharmacy entities.
